data.title: OpenAI's Enterprise User Base Surpasses 3 Million
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI's paid enterprise user base has exceeded 3 million, up from 2 million reported in February. This figure includes customers of ChatGPT Enterprise, ChatGPT Team, and ChatGPT Education editions. OpenAI's Chief Operating Officer, Brad Lightcap, noted a strong connection between ChatGPT's growth as a consumer tool and its application in enterprise and business sectors. As of February, the company reported 400 million weekly active users. A source confirmed that OpenAI expects to generate $12.7 billion in revenue this year.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed K Wave Media raises $500M for its Bitcoin treasury
data.description:
K Wave Media (KWM), the first Korean media alliance to list on the Nasdaq, announced this week that it plans to raise $500 million to build one of Asia’s largest corporate Bitcoin treasuries. While competitors are still figuring out streaming strategies, banging TV shows or chart-topping K-pop albums, K Wave Media is diving headfirst into […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/k-wave-media-raises-500m-bitcoin-treasury/

data.title: SUI Price at Risk: Analyst Warns of Incoming Altcoin Aftershock
data.description:
Cryptocurrency analyst Dan Gambardello has issued warnings about potential risks facing altcoins, including SUI price. This is despite maintaining long-term bullish sentiment on the sector. In his latest analysis, Gambardello examines Federal Reserve policy, institutional accumulation patterns, and technical indicators that suggest both immediate risks and future opportunities for altcoins
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/04/sui-price-at-risk-analyst-warns-of-incoming-altcoin-aftershock/

data.title: 24-Year-Old Arrested for Allegedly Masterminding Several High-Profile Crypto Kidnappings in France: Report
data.description:
The suspected mastermind behind a string of kidnappings targeting cryptocurrency entrepreneurs in France has reportedly been arrested in Morocco. According to a new Barron’s report, Moroccan law enforcement apprehended Badiss Mohamed Amide Bajjou, a 24-year-old Franco-Moroccan man, after an Interpol red notice was issued for him by French authorities over kidnapping allegations.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/04/24-year-old-arrested-for-allegedly-masterminding-several-high-profile-crypto-kidnappings-in-france-report/

data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/world-liberty-financial-airdrops-millions-in-stablecoin/
